C:\vscode\coursework\QT\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\robot.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\robot.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\robot.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\robot.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o robot.exe -Wl,--out-implib,librobot.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\robot.dir\linkLibs.rsp
